resources.string: Add members to share this collection
All users are already members of this collection
Allow anyone to request an account
Allow sharing collections with other users
Couldn\'t save the backup to your device.
Books can be added from the server
Shared book sets for your server
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s? This cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete “%1$s”? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to deny the registration request from
Are you sure you want to remove this member from the collection?
Create a backup of your ListenUp server data.
Create a collection to organize your audiobooks
Create an invite to share with someone who wants to join your audiobook library.
Create a backup to protect your data
Create backups and restore server data
A user with this email already exists.
Enter a name for the collection
New books wait in the inbox until an admin releases them.
Review and release new books waiting for approval.
Invite created! Link copied to clipboard.
Manage scan folders and rescan your library
Migrate listening history from ABS backup
Newly scanned books will appear here for review
No other genres available as a merge target.
No other genres available — only \'Top level\' is possible.
Organize books into collections for access control
New sign-ups need an admin\'s approval before they can join.
Self-registration is off — people join by invite only.
Anyone can register and join instantly.
Upload a .listenup.zip backup file from your device.
You can restore a backup created on any ListenUp server, including one from a different machine. The file will be uploaded and staged, then you\'ll confirm the restore.
Review new books before they appear in library
Scan all paths for new or updated audiobooks
Share your audiobook library with others
Tap + to create your first genre
The book will not be deleted from your library.
The display name for this collection
These books will become visible to ALL users.
They will no longer have access to the books in this collection.
They won\'t be able to use this link anymore.
This user\'s permissions cannot be modified
You\'re creating the first account on this server.
Create an account request. An admin will review and approve your registration.
Thousands of audiobooks. One beautiful library.
Your account is pending administrator approval.
A server admin needs to review your request.
Your library unlocks the moment you\'re approved.
Set up your ListenUp server by creating the first admin account.
Sign in to access your audiobook library.
You\'ll be automatically signed in once approved.
Your registration request has been submitted and is awaiting admin approval.
p. %1$d of %2$d · tap to show controls
Couldn\'t start the download. Please try again.
Not enough storage. Need %1$dMB, have %2$dMB available.
Clear your progress and mark this as not started?
Streaming is unavailable. Downloaded books still play.
No one is reading this book yet.
This book had a scanning error — double-check the files aren’t corrupted.
You can re-download anytime by playing the book.
You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
Double tap to change sort options
e.g., Staff Picks, Sci-Fi, New Releases...
Choose a server from your network
Enter the address of your ListenUp server to get started.
Make sure your ListenUp server is running on the same network
Choose a ListenUp server on your network — or add one manually.
Your server address looks like https://yourname.listenup.app — find it in your server dashboard.
from your library. This action cannot be undone.

The contributor you choose is merged into this one: their books are re-linked here (their original credit is preserved) and their name is added as an alias. The chosen contributor is then removed; this contributor\'s biography, image, and other details are kept.
No alternate names yet. Merge another author to add one.
No pen names yet. Add aliases to merge other contributors into this one.
This will remove this contributor from your library. Books will not be deleted.
This will split "%1$s" back into its own contributor. Any books credited as "%1$s" will be re-linked to the new contributor.
Signing out a device ends its playback sessions and removes its downloads.
Sign out of all devices, including this one?
Start listening to climb the rankings.
No activity yet. Start listening to see what your community is reading!
No one\'s listening right now. Check back soon!
Start listening to join the community rankings
When other users create shelves with books you can access, they\'ll appear here.
Your session expired. Please sign in again.
Sign in to the server that hosts this book to open it.
This book is on a different ListenUp server than the one you\'re signed in to.
That resource is in use or already exists.
You don\'t have permission to do that.
Can\'t reach the server. Check your connection.
The request took too long. Please try again.
We couldn\'t load your Listen Now.
Start listening to an audiobook and it will appear here
Start listening to see your stats here
Analysis was likely interrupted. Cancel and try again.
Analyzing backup contents and matching books
Matching your Audiobookshelf library against ListenUp...
Writing listening history to the database.
Writing listening history to the database...
Search for a ListenUp book to assign
This will delete the stuck import. You can create a new one afterwards.
Migrate your listening history from an Audiobookshelf backup. We\'ll match users and merge sessions into your library.
Choose how to create a new import:
Create a new import from an Audiobookshelf backup to get started.
Your data stays on your server
Are you sure you want to delete "%1$s"? This cannot be undone.
Delete this import? This cannot be undone.
Your listening history has been imported.
Migrate listening history from an ABS backup
Import a backup to migrate your Audiobookshelf listening history.
Migrate your listening history from an Audiobookshelf backup.
Import listening history from an Audiobookshelf backup.
Keep the app open until this finishes
Keep ListenUp open until this finishes
Match Audiobookshelf books to your ListenUp library.
Match Audiobookshelf users to ListenUp users.
Choose what to import from the Audiobookshelf backup.
Match each Audiobookshelf account to a ListenUp profile, or skip it.
%1$s user(s) still need review — their history will be skipped.
Select a backup file from your device
Map ABS accounts to ListenUp profiles
Upload your Audiobookshelf backup to migrate listening history and progress.
Your backup has been uploaded and analyzed.
Sending your backup to the server.
Enter the code from your invitation to get started.
Add audiobooks to your server to get started
Create a collection in the Admin section first
Books you add to your server will appear here
%1$s will appear here when you have audiobooks in your library
You don\'t have any shelves yet
Your audiobooks will appear here once the scan is complete
This is taking longer than expected. You can continue to your library now — the rest will keep appearing as it syncs.
You can re-run the scan anytime from Settings.
Analyzing %1$d of %2$d files — your shelves are filling in.
Select the folders on your server where your audiobooks are stored.
This folder has no subfolders. You can select it as a library location.
Select at least one folder to continue.
Select one or more folders where your audiobooks are stored.
ListenUp is built with open-source software. Thank you to everyone who contributed.
License text is not available for this library.
Audible catalog. Try a different region:
Audible names replace your chapter labels. Timings stay the same.
%1$d Audible chapters → your %2$d — different edition, unavailable.
%1$d Audible chapters match — review and apply.
Enter a title, author, narrator, or ASIN to search
Search Audible for this book, then choose the edition that matches your audiobook.
Try a different search term or region.
Audible names replace your current chapter labels. Timings stay the same.
Search by title, author, or ASIN
Enter a title, author, narrator, or ASIN to search.
Try a different search term or region
Try selecting a different region above.
Your book already has all the available metadata from Audible. No changes to apply.
Pause when the current chapter ends
Playback will pause when this chapter ends
Shown across your profile and reviews.
Update your first and last name
No shelves yet. Create one to curate your favorite books!
Set a new password for your account
A short bio that appears on your profile
Find books by title, author, narrator, or series
Enter a description for this series...
All of this series\'s books will be re-pointed at the target. This series will be deleted; the target\'s description, cover, and other details win.
Are you sure you want to sign out? You\'ll need to sign in again to access your library.
Choose light, dark, or follow system
Hide series with only one book
ListenUp uses the following open source libraries:
Rewind a few seconds when resuming playback
Sort ignoring leading articles (A, An, The)
This server is already set up. Sign in instead.
Shelves are your own collections — group books however you like. Make a shelf private to keep it just for you, or leave it public to share with everyone on the server.
Add books from your library to build this shelf.
Only you can see this shelf.
This will permanently delete this shelf. Books in the shelf will not be affected.
Visible to anyone on the server.
The server\'s library has changed. You have unsaved changes that will be lost.
Your library is up to date
We couldn\'t reach your server to check your library setup. Check your connection and try again.
